src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support to allow the use of @Scheduled annotations.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.human_impl: Added @EnableScheduling annotation and import to ServerApplication class.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Remove inheritance from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter which was deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in 6.0.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to a standalone class with @EnableWebSecurity.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Enable method-level security annotations using the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Added @EnableMethodSecurity(securedEnabled = true) annotation to the configuration class.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method override with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Defined a @Bean method returning SecurityFilterChain that configures HttpSecurity via the builder pattern.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update authorization configuration to use the new authorizeHttpRequests API instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Replaced .authorizeRequests() with .authorizeHttpRequests(registry -> { ... }) and updated matchers to requestMatchers.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update filter registration to use the new addFilterBefore API with UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.
Explicitly configure CORS support using a dedicated CorsFilter bean and HttpSecurity cors configuration.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Added corsFilter bean and .cors(withDefaults()) to the SecurityFilterChain configuration.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Add a PasswordEncoder bean definition, likely required by the new security context or future password handling.
Remove the explicit PreAuthenticatedAuthenticationProvider bean as authentication is now handled by the JwtRequestFilter.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Removed preAuthProvider bean and associated FirebaseTokenUserDetailsService dependency.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.general_idea: Migrate the UserRepository from Spring Data JPA to jOOQ for database access.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.human_impl: Changed class from interface extending JpaRepository to class using DSLContext and Zkmf2024UserDao.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok @Slf4j annotation for cleaner code.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed 'private static final Logger logger...' and added '@Slf4j' annotation, changing 'logger.info' to 'log.info'.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Update validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3/Java 21.
Rename DTO classes to follow standard naming conventions (ending in DTO instead of RequestDto).
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Renamed RegisterHelperRequestDto to RegisterHelperRequestDTO, RegisterNewsletterRequestDto to RegisterNewsletterRequestDTO, and added LoginRequestDTO/LoginResponseDTO.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Remove Firebase Auth integration as the authentication mechanism is being migrated to a local database-backed JWT system.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed imports for com.google.firebase.auth and deleted the registerBand method that used FirebaseAuth.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Implement a new login endpoint that authenticates users against the local database and issues JWTs.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added POST /public/auth endpoint accepting LoginRequestDTO, checking password with PasswordEncoder, and returning LoginResponseDTO with JWT.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Add support for admin impersonation using a master password configuration.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added logic in login endpoint to check against applicationProperties.getEncodedMasterPassword() and set impersonation flag in JWT.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace placeholder helper registration logic with actual service integration.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Replaced TODO comment and empty response with call to helperRegistrationService.register() and switch expression for results.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace placeholder newsletter registration logic with actual service integration.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Replaced TODO comment and empty response with call to newsletterService.register() and switch expression for results.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Inject new services required for the updated authentication and registration flows.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added fields and constructor parameters for NewsletterService, HelperRegistrationService, JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and ApplicationProperties.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/se.general_idea: Replace domain entity imports with DTO imports to decouple the REST layer from persistence models.
Remove unused javax.persistence import as part of cleaning up dependencies or preparing for Jakarta EE migration.
Update user role retrieval logic to map from POJO role string to UserRole enum instead of calling a method on the User entity.
Simplify the exception throwing syntax by removing the explicit constructor reference.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace MySQL connector with PostgreSQL driver to match the new database backend.
Replace MySQL testcontainers with PostgreSQL testcontainers for integration tests.
Add Spring Boot starter for jOOQ to replace or supplement JPA for data access.
Add Spring WebFlux starter for reactive web capabilities.
Add Spring Boot starter for Bean Validation support.
Add Spring Boot starter for sending emails.
Add Spring Boot starter for Thymeleaf templating engine.
Add Apache POI library for Excel file processing.
Add Apache POI OOXML library for modern Excel format support.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility methods.
Add JJWT API for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson module for JSON serialization.
Upgrade MapStruct version to 1.5.5.Final for compatibility with newer Java/Spring.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the Angular frontend during the Maven build.
Add typescript-generator-maven-plugin to generate TypeScript DTOs from Java classes.
Add jOOQ code generation plugin to generate Java classes from the database schema.
Add Flyway Maven plugin for database migration management.
Add SonarQube Maven plugin for code quality analysis.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to 3.2.2 for better test execution support.
Upgrade Maven Compiler plugin to 3.11.0 for Java 21 support.
Rename the artifact ID from 'server' to 'zkmf2024-server' for clarity.
Update project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Add database connection properties for local development.
Add SonarCloud organization and project key properties.
Add Maven profiles for production and staging frontend builds.
Configure resource filtering and static asset copying in the build section.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper JAR to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.6 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and modern plugin features.

.run/ServerApplication.run.xml.general_idea: Configure the IDE run configuration to explicitly use Java 21 as the execution runtime.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Updated header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0' and changed download URLs to point to org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/3.2.0.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax for better readability and nesting support.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed instances like `uname` to $(uname) and `java-config --jre-home` to $(java-config --jre-home).

mvnw.general_idea: Remove reliance on the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable, relying instead on the wrapper jar location.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed logic resolving M2_HOME and removed -Dmaven.home=${M2_HOME} from the final exec command.

mvnw.general_idea: Add SHA-256 checksum verification for the downloaded Maven Wrapper JAR to ensure integrity.
mvnw.human_impl: Added logic to read wrapperSha256Sum from properties and validate the JAR using sha256sum or shasum.

mvnw.general_idea: Improve robustness on Windows by handling carriage returns in configuration files and paths.
mvnw.human_impl: Added tr -d '\r' when reading properties and improved path handling in cygwin/mingw blocks.

mvnw.general_idea: Add explicit error handling for directory changes and command failures to prevent silent failures.
mvnw.human_impl: Added || exit 1 to cd commands and || rm -f to download commands to clean up on failure.

mvnw.general_idea: Switch to the new official Maven Wrapper launcher class.
Introduce a centralized logging mechanism for verbose output.
mvnw.human_impl: Added a log() function and replaced direct echo statements with log calls when MVNW_VERBOSE is true.

mvnw.general_idea: Fix argument expansion to correctly handle arguments with spaces.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS assignment from $@ to $* and adjusted the final exec command.
